name: edubrain-microservices
description: EduBrain Online Learning Platform - Microservices with GraphQL & SQLite

scripts.start: concurrently -k "node auth/backend/src/index.js" "node students/backend/src/index.js" "node courses/backend/src/index.js" "node enrollments/backend/src/index.js" "node attendance/backend/src/index.js" "node articles/backend/src/index.js" "node form_discussion/backend/src/index.js" "node gateway/backend/src/index.js"
scripts.dev: concurrently -k "nodemon auth/backend/src/index.js" "nodemon students/backend/src/index.js" "nodemon courses/backend/src/index.js" "nodemon enrollments/backend/src/index.js" "nodemon attendance/backend/src/index.js" "nodemon articles/backend/src/index.js" "nodemon form_discussion/backend/src/index.js" "nodemon gateway/backend/src/index.js"
